_meta.description: Children's book series. Canonical source of truth. Descriptions #1-#2 from approved scripts; #3-#5 held (no script available). Tier per Appendix A2.

books.title: Egypt the Cat
books.tagline: All-ages adventures with a boy and his cat.
books.synopsis: Egypt the Cat is a warm, all-ages picture-book series created by Derek Uskert and his son Ness and illustrated by Michael Bryan Quiambao. In each story, young Ness and his cat Egypt turn an everyday moment into a gentle adventure.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic! cover: a boy and an orange cat perform a magic act.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic!
issues.synopsis: Ness puts on a magic show — and when he makes his cat Egypt "disappear" into a top hat, Egypt hides so well that Ness sets off on a worried search to find him.

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Magic! Magic! Magic! cover, cover art by Alyssa Mao.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat in Dance Maniac
issues.synopsis: Stuck indoors cleaning his room on a sunny day when he'd rather be outside, Ness is coaxed out of his funk by a little "razzle dazzle."

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat in Dance Maniac cover.

issues.title: Egypt the Cat Leaves Los Angeles

cover.alt: Egypt the Cat Leaves Los Angeles cover.
Egypt the Cat in Time cover.
